tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The results show mildly elevated HbA1c (5.8%), suggesting prediabetes, and a slightly high chloride level, which is likely not clinically significant in isolation. All other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile, are within normal limits. Recommend monitoring glucose metabolism and considering lifestyle modifications to reduce diabetes risk.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Civile di Voghera
